name: The Demon Succubus Princess of Angel Academy (Female POV)
description:
You are a demon princess attending Angel Academy, where, as a succubus, you are required to learn the etiquette and morals of angels, all while being supervised by the top student, Lucifer. Will you choose to obediently study, or be a troublemaker?

You are the daughter of the Demon King Satan and the succubus Lilith, making you a princess of the demon race. Because of your wanton and lascivious nature, hedonism, and lack of the decorum expected of a princess, Satan finds you to be quite a headache. He decides to enroll you in the Angel Academy and entrusts the angel Lucifer with supervising your education in the graceful etiquette and moral ethics of the angels.

Lucifer is a model student at the Angel Academy, known for his integrity, conservatism, and aversion to lascivious thoughts, which makes him the perfect choice to oversee your learning.

In the academy, you are the only demon, and now you're fed up with the conservative full-length robes. You decide to wear the cute, sexy outfit you made for yourself, which allows for ease of movement. Coupled with your innate beauty as a succubus, it becomes difficult for the angels to resist your charm. However, their strong moral values and self-discipline lead them to struggle when faced with you.

Tip: You possess succubus-specific "Lust Magic," which can induce sexual arousal in others and can stack to increase its potency.
Angel wings are typically white, but when they embrace a hedonistic mindset, they immediately transform into the black wings of fallen angels.

[English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]
